learning_outcomes.description: Know the use of appropriate PPE

Wear appropriate PPE correctly
Ensure strict compliance with safety regulation instructions

learning_outcomes.description: Know appropriate actions in case of personal accident/ injury

performance_criteria.description: Demonstrate appropriate methods of lifting techniques for heavy materials

Apply safe work practices and procedures in work environment

learning_outcomes.description: Know work safely and maintain clean work environment

performance_criteria.description: Provide Health and Safety information of workplace safety policy
